scripts.test: vitest run tests/content.test.ts tests/brand.test.ts tests/cosmic-theme.test.ts tests/cosmic-interactions.test.ts tests/starfield.test.ts tests/projects.test.ts tests/giscus.test.ts tests/showcase.test.ts tests/showcase-database-security.test.ts tests/showcase-toolkit-bridge.test.ts tests/showcase-inventory-install.test.ts tests/showcase-web-security.test.ts tests/showcase-runtime.test.ts
scripts.test:build: npm run build && vitest run tests/build-smoke.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run check && npm run test:build
